title: wither-storm but better
description: Modpack to run Crackers Witherstorm mod on fabric
body: This modpack uses [Kilt](https://modrinth.com/mod/kilt) to run [Cracker's witherstorm mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) on fabric and also includes a a few performance and quality of life mods
